mapper.insert: INSERT INTO player (id, nickname, avatar, warehouse_points, table_points, pending_points, level_experience, total_points, level, is_online, is_spectating, last_login_time, registration_time, is_verified, age, ip_address, device_info, user_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{warehousePoints}, #{tablePoints}, #{pendingPoints}, #{levelExperience}, #{totalPoints}, #{level}, #{online}, #{spectating}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{registrationTime}, #{verified}, #{age}, #{ipAddress}, #{deviceInfo}, #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE player SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, warehouse_points = #{warehousePoints}, table_points = #{tablePoints}, pending_points = #{pendingPoints}, level_experience = #{levelExperience}, total_points = #{totalPoints}, level = #{level}, is_online = #{online}, is_spectating = #{spectating}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, registration_time = #{registrationTime}, is_verified = #{verified}, age = #{age}, ip_address = #{ipAddress}, device_info = #{deviceInfo}, user_id = #{userId} WHERE id = #{id}
